description: Accidentally, a large batch of emails was deleted into the Trash. Restore the three specific vendor invoices for 'Apex Corp' ('Apex Corp - Q3 Invoice #1048', 'Apex Corp - Q3 Invoice #1049', and 'Overdue: Apex Corp Invoice #1022') from the Trash to the Inbox. These three emails must be marked as 'Unread' in the Inbox, and all remaining emails in the Trash must be permanently deleted.
